_provenance.stage: Stage 5 — Contrarian Stress-Test (Grok, browser, on v3)
_provenance.tool: Grok browser response (second run — first run hallucinated NEP / Bumiputera content)
_provenance.note: Stage 5 is retired per CLAUDE.md but was run for stress-testing. This run engaged the actual issue. Critical to weigh: many 'hard truths' are labelled MY_OPINION rather than VERIFIED — Stage 6 should not import unverified Stage 5 opinions as fact. Stage 5's VERIFIED items reinforce Stage 3 and Stage 4 findings. Stage 5's strongest landed critique: the analysis hides behind 'process-not-substance' to avoid naming that Zahid is mobilising the Malay base with already-strengthened laws because the post-1969 racial-religious settlement is under pressure and ALL major parties (UMNO, PAS, PKR, DAP) have failed to repeal these laws.

verified_hard_truths.truth: Every major party — UMNO, PAS, PKR, DAP — has either weaponised or failed to repeal these laws when in power because they are electorally useful.
verified_hard_truths.primary_source: SUHAKAM Media Statement 02/2026; FMT 22 Apr 2026 on PAS sedition enforcement
verified_hard_truths.t4a_decision: ECHO Stage 4's finding. INCORPORATE the cross-party complicity angle into Stage 6 — it sharpens 'why hasn't this been fixed in 14 years.'

verified_hard_truths.truth: The Sedition Act s.3(1)(f) plus Article 181 give the Malay Rulers near-total constitutional protection from criticism. This is a verified statutory fact.
verified_hard_truths.primary_source: Federal Constitution Article 181; Sedition Act s.3(1)(f)
verified_hard_truths.t4a_decision: Already covered in Card 1. Per the 3R Royalty discipline we do not editorialise on the power balance.

my_opinion_only_not_imported: Malay Unease framing reflects existential erosion of constitutional special position (Art 153) — MY_OPINION, not verified.
Chinese and Indian Malaysians are disproportionately subjects of 'insult' investigations when they question Malay privileges — MY_OPINION, no demographic data verified.
Penal Code 298A overwhelmingly protects state-sanctioned Sunni orthodoxy — MY_OPINION.
Women face heightened legal risk on Islam/royalty/Malay-privilege speech — MY_OPINION (Stage 4 did surface 1-2 specific cases but the systemic claim is unverified).
useful_predictions: Sedition Act and CMA investigations will continue at elevated levels (30-50+/yr) with spikes around royal birthdays, elections, viral incidents; the 2012 replacement bill will remain in draft. WHO CAN FIX: PM Anwar/DPM Zahid via cabinet majority. WHY THEY WON'T: Anwar's coalition depends on UMNO+Malay support; UMNO's relevance requires demonstrating 'firm' 3R defence.
audience_check: Taxi driver in Ipoh / teacher in Kota Bharu would find the analysis bloodless and legalistic. Hawker in Penang / factory worker in Johor (often non-Malay) would roll eyes — KL elite document sanitising tools that chill their speech. Farmer in Sabah would ignore it as West Malaysia elite theatre.

false_balance_flag.where: Card 2 and reframe treat the surge in cases and the stalled replacement bill as neutral background.
false_balance_flag.evidence_says: CIJ documents 42 individuals investigated under Sedition Act in 2025; political critics and student activists at 14% each — enforcement is not random.
false_balance_flag.t4a_decision: Stage 6 will incorporate the 'half of cases target political critics' finding from Stage 4 / Stage 5, sharpening the rights card.

strongest_card_per_stage5.why: Directly exposes that the analysis sanitises a nakedly political speech at a 'Malay Unease' forum into a pure legal-process question.

weakest_card_per_stage5.why: Gender / culture dimension genuinely peripheral; analogy overstates the FC ruling's scope.

overall_assessment: Factually meticulous but diplomatically cowardly — hides behind '3R discipline' to avoid naming that Zahid is mobilising the Malay base because the post-1969 settlement is under social-media pressure and the entire political class has zero incentive to fix the asymmetric enforcement architecture. Stage 6 should NOT import the MY_OPINION claims but SHOULD use the VERIFIED items (cross-party complicity, half-of-cases-target-political-critics).
